title: Tekwiz
description: A modpack with the best and the most necessary magic, tech, and quality of life mods.
body:
<details>
<summary>Content</summary>
  
Artifacts: Adds some unique items found only in structures the mod adds

Draconic Evolution: An extremely endgame mod combining magic and technology into one 

Blood Magic: A mod that adds demonic magic, armor and rituals

Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks: A mod that adds a variety of spells and magic items

Botania: A mod that is focused on aggricultural magic and has a lot of interesting bosses and items

Chococraft: Adds chocobos, a mob which provides early game transportation

Thermal Foundation: A mod that adds the ability to produce power and use it for many different machines and mods

Thermal Expansion: An expansion adding more to the thermal series including collaberations with other mods

Thermal Dynamics: Adds thermal series pipes and connections

Thermal Cultivation: Adds thermal series aggricultural automation

Extreme Reactors: Power supply mod for your tech for late game

Tinker's Construct: A blacksmith mod that gives you the chance to make custom tools, weapons, and armor

Tinker's Leveling Addon: Gives you the ability to level your tinker's construct tools and gain more modifiers

Ad Astra: Adds the addition of space travel to different planets

Applied Energistics 2: Adds a computer that functions as one big storage and crafting system

EnderIO: Adds quite a lot of useful items most notably ones for automation
</details>
<details>
<summary>Quality of Life</summary>

Iron Furnaces: Adds upgradable furnaces

Iron Chests: Adds upgradable chests

Heart Crystals: Adds heart crystals you can find in the world to give yourself more health

Chicken Chunks: Adds a block that allows you to keep chunks loaded for your base/farms/etc

GravestoneMod: When you die all of your items will go into a gravestone that you can break later so they won't despawn

ElevatorMod: Adds a simple elevator block making it easier to make a seamless multi-floor base

AzureDooms Angel Ring: Adds a variety of end game rings that give access to creative flight

Sophisticated Backpack: Adds backpacks for additional inventory storage

Mob Lassos: Adds a lasso giving you the ability to transport mobs efficiently

Portable Spawners: Adds the ability to silk touch spawners

Resource Nether Ores: Adds a more efficient and dangerous way to obtain ores via the nether

Supplementaries: Adds a bunch of different kinds of decorations

Chisel Reborn: Allows you to chisel vanilla blocks offering many different variations for building/decorating

Another Furniture: Adds a bunch of different furniture

Trash Cans: Adds a block that allows you to dispense of unwanted items instead of chucking them near your house
</details>
<details>
<summary>Performance & Game</summary>

Embeddium: Performance

Chloride: Performance

FerriteCore: Performance
 
CubesWithoutBorders: Adds option for borderless fulscreen

Occulus: Forge fork of Iris Shaders

Jade: Allows you to see what items/blocks are from which mod

JEI: Allows you to see different crafting recipes across mods

Controlling: Adds the ability to search keybinds

Searchables: Makes it easier to search through different mods

ToroHealth Damage Indicators: Allows you to see mob health across different mods

OreExcavation: Allows you to mine a whole vein of ore at one one time via keybind

CoreCommands: Gives you acess to /sethome /warp /spawn etc.

EssentialMod: Makes it easier to host and join worlds with friends

Super Bosses: Adds rare mob variations that are stronger

Mowzie's Mobs: Adds a few interesting new bosses

Dungeons and Taverns: Lots of new structures to discover and defeat
</details>
